---
title: 'Circle of Life Cycles'
date: '2014-04-26T04:49:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7434168203076179392'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/circle-of-life-cycles.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Poetic Playground?'
---

<br /><b>Thus the circle of life cycles; ebbs and flows.&nbsp;</b><br /><b><br /></b>There was a moment in time.<br /><br />It was <i>that </i>moment.<br /><br />The moment everything changed.<br /><br />The change happens. The bud comes forth.<br /><br />The flower blooms. The flower dies.<br /><br />The plant appears to die.<br /><br />But... it comes in circles.<br /><br />It's not dead.<br /><br />It's merely hibernating.<br /><br />Spring comes, winter thaws.<br /><br />Leaves push forth, new stems, a bud appears.<br /><br /><br /><b>Thus the circle of life cycles; ebbs and flows.&nbsp;</b><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
